howItWorks.intro: This patent cost calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Micro entity: 75% fee reduction (income < $229K, ≤4 prior patents)
Utility patent total cost: $10,000-15,000+ through prosecution
Maintenance fees due at years 3.5, 7.5, and 11.5
howItWorks.outro: Laws vary by jurisdiction and change frequently. This is not legal advice — consult a licensed attorney.

faq.question: How much does a patent cost total?
faq.answer: Provisional: $2,000-4,000. Utility patent: $10,000-20,000+ through prosecution. Design patent: $3,000-5,000. These include attorney fees, which are the bulk of the cost. DIY filing is risky for utility patents.

faq.question: Should I file a provisional patent first?
faq.answer: Often yes. A provisional costs $2,000-4,000, establishes your filing date, and gives you 12 months to test the market before committing $10,000+ to a full utility patent. You can use 'Patent Pending' status immediately.

faq.question: How long does a patent last?
faq.answer: Utility patents: 20 years from filing. Design patents: 15 years from grant. You must pay maintenance fees at 3.5, 7.5, and 11.5 years to keep utility patents alive. Missing a maintenance fee can kill your patent.

faq.question: Is the Patent Cost Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

faq.question: How accurate is this calculator?
faq.answer: This calculator uses standard practical calculation formulas trusted by users. Results are reliable estimates for planning purposes. For critical decisions, we recommend consulting a qualified professional to verify.

sections.title: What Is the Patent Cost Calculator?
sections.body: The Patent Cost Calculator is a free online tool designed for users who need quick, accurate calculations in the practical calculation space. By entering your patent type, entity size, you get instant results including uspto filing fees, attorney fees, total estimated cost. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting uspto filing fees right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In practical calculation, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by users worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to get accurate results with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your patent type and need to find the right uspto filing fees. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.
